DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.title: Familiar Treat
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.description: Adds a Feed Familiar option at rest sites. Feeding your familiar gives Familiar Cards [blue]+1[/blue] damage/block for the rest of this run.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT.flavor: A ration carefully blended for loyal familiars. Definitely not for human consumption.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.title: Familiar Treat+
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.descrip: Adds a Feed Familiar option at rest sites. Feeding your familiar gives Familiar Cards [blue]+2[/blue] damage/block for the rest of this run.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FAMILIAR_TREAT_PLUS.flavor: It's just a recolor, but somehow it packs more punch?
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.title: Witch's Notebook
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.description: The first Elemental Base Incantation you play each turn is free to play.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WITCH_NOTEBOOK.flavor: An indispensable notebook for an experienced witch.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.title: Magical Scroll
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.description: Increase your Empower Sigil maximum to [blue]8[/blue]. At the start of combat, a random Empower-type Incantation in your deck costs {CostReduction} less this combat.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MAGICAL_SCROLL.flavor: It can unlock a witch's true potential.
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.title: Black Grimoire
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.description: Intelligence no longer has any effect. All Magical Damage becomes normal damage and is affected by damage modifiers such as Strength, Weak, and Vulnerable. Generated spell cards use Strength instead of Intelligence for their damage bonus. Whenever you would gain Intelligence, gain [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity instead.
DMFDWITCHMOD-BLACK_GRIMOIRE.flavor: Some say this is the legendary Akashic Record.
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.title: Mystic Mirror
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.description: You cannot gain a [gold]Condense Sigil[/gold]. Homing spells deal {HomingDamageBonus}% more damage. Chaotic Incantation always grants a [gold]Homing Sigil[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-MYSTIC_MIRROR.flavor: Unfortunately, this magic mirror does not talk.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.title: Revitalizing Orb
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.descriptio: Reduce your Empower Sigil maximum by {EmpowerMaxReduction}. When obtained, transform all Heal Incantations in your deck into Regen Incantations, preserving upgrades and enchantments.
DMFDWITCHMOD-REVITALIZING_ORB.flavor: Endless restorative magic circulates within the orb.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.title: Weird Lantern
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.description: The first time you [gold]release[/gold] each turn, you may [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your hand. If you do, gain {Energy:energyIcons:}. Reduce your Empower Sigil maximum by {EmpowerMaxReduction}.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WEIRD_LANTERN.flavor: For some reason, the sight of it makes a question mark pop into your mind.
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.title: Cursed Doll
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.description: When you apply a debuff to yourself, double its amount. Whenever you gain a debuff, gain {IntelligencePower} [gold]Intelligence[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-CURSED_DOLL.flavor: A little scary, but also a little cute.
DMFDWITCHMOD-POISON_DRAGON_CONTRACT.desc: When [gold]releasing[/gold] [pink]Heal[/pink] or [purple]Regen[/purple] Sigil, generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Poison[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-POISON_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flav: An earth-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering healing magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Wind Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descri: When [gold]releasing[/gold] [green]Wind[/green] Sigil, generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-WIND_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A wood-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering gale magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_DRAGON_CONTRACT.des: When [gold]releasing[/gold] [gold]Thunder[/gold] Sigil, generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Shock[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-THUNDER_DRAGON_CONTRACT.fla: A metal-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering lightning magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Ice Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descrip: When [gold]releasing[/gold] [blue]Ice[/blue] Sigil, generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Frostbite[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-ICE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A water-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering ice magic.
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.title: Fire Dragon Contract
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.descri: When [gold]releasing[/gold] [red]Fire[/red] Sigil, generated spells gain [blue]+1[/blue] Empower. Familiar Attack applies [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
DMFDWITCHMOD-FIRE_DRAGON_CONTRACT.flavor: A fire-aligned pact with the Astral Dragon Atruum, empowering flame magic.
